close_reason: Added ## Panics section to all three try_sign doc comments
description: signature::Signer::sign() (the default impl from the signature crate) panics when try_sign() returns Err. The crate-level doc example calls signer.sign(b"hello") with no panic warning. Any HSM or network error during signing causes an unrecoverable panic that callers cannot catch or handle. The docs must warn that sign() panics on error and direct callers to use try_sign() in fallible contexts.
title: sign() panic undocumented in signer types
